title: Cuirilla-Raye (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cuirilla-Raye''' may refer to one of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[VR-10 Cuirilla-Raye Xylines-class spacetug]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*The [[VR-10 Cuirilla-Rayl Xylines-class spacetug|'''VR-10 ''Cuirilla-Rayl Xylines''-class spacetug''']], also misspelled as the '''Cuirilla-Rayes ''Xylines''-class Spacetug'''

{{Disambig}}
